HGSS.144.0000:
Cynthia: This is the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000]. The
mythical stage built to show respect\r
for ARCEUS.\f
It is said that people used to
celebrate its magnificent might with\r
music and dance.\f
Some people in Johto still pass down
this tradition.\f
HGSS.144.0001:
Cynthia: This is the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000]. The
mythical stage built to show respect\r
for ARCEUS.\f
It is said that people used to
celebrate its magnificent might with\r
music and dance.\f
Some people in Johto still pass down
this tradition.
HGSS.144.0002:
Cynthia: The [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000] allows a
single ARCEUS and nothing else to\r
get on the stage...\f
If you wish to go up there, you have
to deposit your other Pokémon in\r
a PC Box at the cabin.
HGSS.144.0003:
Cynthia: Bring your ARCEUS instead.\f
Any other Pokémon may get blown away
by the strong power lingering\r
at the ruins.\f
HGSS.144.0004:
Cynthia: This is where one might say,
“The lead enters the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000]\r
at last.”\f
All my study of ruins and Pokémon
mythology in Sinnoh may have been\r
to bring you up on this stage\r
here today...\f
HGSS.144.0005:
Cynthia: Depicted on the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000]
are the Pokémon that shaped\r
this world.\f
The circle in the middle is ARCEUS,
the origin of it all...\f
HGSS.144.0006:
Cynthia: According to an ancient
document, time, space, and antimatter,\r
or what combined we call the world,\r
shall be born when ARCEUS stands\r
on the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000].\f
HGSS.144.0007:
Cynthia: This is the pattern that
represents PALKIA, the master of\r
space and dimensions...\f
HGSS.144.0008:
Cynthia: This is the pattern that
represents DIALGA, the guardian\r
of time...\f
HGSS.144.0009:
Cynthia: This is the pattern that
represents GIRATINA, the ruler of\r
the world that is on the opposite side\r
of ours, the world of antimatter...\f
HGSS.144.0010:
Cynthia: ARCEUS has accepted you as
a Trainer.\f
ARCEUS, having shaped the world,
is said to show you a glimpse of\r
its true power.\f
The power of possibly making life
appear out of nothing...\f
HGSS.144.0011:
Cynthia: It seems that something
will happen when you choose one\r
of the circles...\f
You’ll want to be well prepared.
HGSS.144.0012:
Cynthia: Once you are ready, choose a
circle and stand in the middle of it.
HGSS.144.0013:
Cynthia: So you choose DIALGA,
the guardian of time? [0200,0000]
HGSS.144.0014:
Cynthia: So you choose PALKIA, the
master of space and dimensions? [0200,0000]
HGSS.144.0015:
Cynthia: So you choose GIRATINA,
the ruler of the Distortion World? [0200,0000]
HGSS.144.0016:
Cynthia: That shining sphere...
Could it be...an Egg?\f
Did we just witness the very moment
an Egg was brought to this world?\r
A moment no one has ever seen?\f
HGSS.144.0017:
Cynthia: An Egg is the cradle of every
being. This planet itself is an Egg\rin a sense...\fLife that comes from an Egg will
come to an end in due course...\rto begin anew...\fThat may be what ARCEUS
wanted to show us.\f
HGSS.144.0019:
Cynthia: We seem to be surrounded by
that strong power again...!\f
HGSS.144.0020:
Cynthia: Of course... ARCEUS!\f
So the source of the power I’ve felt
was ARCEUS!\f
HGSS.144.0021:
Cynthia: What is now the [FF00,0001]Sinjoh Ruins
[FF00,0000]was built to honor ARCEUS by the\r
Sinnoh people...\f
It’s an icebound temple that has been
waiting for ARCEUS for hundreds\r
of years...\f
HGSS.144.0022:
Cynthia: This is the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000].\f
It is designed to bring out the power
ARCEUS possesses.\f
HGSS.144.0023:
Cynthia: ARCEUS is described in
mythology as being the origin of\r
everything and the source of\r
all beings.\f
It is said that the power of ARCEUS
is released on the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000]!\f
HGSS.144.0024:
Cynthia: The [FF00,0001]Sinjoh Ruins[FF00,0000] are what
remains of a temple built to show\r
respect for ARCEUS.
HGSS.144.0025:
The mysterious round object
took the shape of a Pokémon!\f
HGSS.144.0030: This place does not seem to respond...
HGSS.144.0031:
It seems that only a single ARCEUS
can stand here...
HGSS.144.0032:
Would you like to give a nickname
to the [0100,0001,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.144.0033:
It seems it no longer responds
to this ARCEUS...
